name: Baseline: all shapes, unique questions, 2026-05-25
description: Single comprehensive baseline. Each scenario exercises a distinct SQL shape or pipeline capability. Designed to be diverse (no duplicates of existing suites), thorough (every shape covered), and challenging (mix of Medium/Hard with selected Easy anchors). Use as the canonical baseline number.

Scenarios.Question: total count of customers in the database
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Customers

Scenarios.Question: how many outages are currently ongoing
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Outages WHERE ResolvedAt IS NULL

Scenarios.Question: count of distinct service types that have at least one ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ServiceTypeId) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE ServiceTypeId IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: total billed amount across all customers
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(TotalAmount) AS TotalBilled FROM Bills WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: average meter reading value
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(Value) AS AverageReading FROM MeterReadings

Scenarios.Question: minimum and maximum csat score recorded
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MIN(Score) AS MinScore, MAX(Score) AS MaxScore FROM CsatResponses

Scenarios.Question: average ticket resolution time in hours
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(DATEDIFF(hour, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt)) AS AvgResolutionHours FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: ticket count per status
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketStatuses.Name, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets INNER JOIN TicketStatuses ON Tickets.StatusId = TicketStatuses.Id WHERE Tickets.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY TicketStatuses.Name

Scenarios.Question: bills summed by service type
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT ServiceTypes.NameEn, SUM(Bills.TotalAmount) AS Total FROM Bills INNER JOIN ServiceTypes ON Bills.ServiceTypeId = ServiceTypes.Id WHERE Bills.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY ServiceTypes.NameEn

Scenarios.Question: customer count grouped by governorate
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Regions.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Customers INNER JOIN Regions ON Customers.RegionId = Regions.Id GROUP BY Regions.NameEn

Scenarios.Question: average resolution time in hours grouped by priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketPriorities.Name, AVG(DATEDIFF(hour, Tickets.CreatedAt, Tickets.ResolvedAt)) AS AvgHours FROM Tickets INNER JOIN TicketPriorities ON Tickets.PriorityId = TicketPriorities.Id WHERE Tickets.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND Tickets.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY TicketPriorities.Name

Scenarios.Question: ticket totals broken down by status and priority pair
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketStatuses.Name AS Status, TicketPriorities.Name AS Priority, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets INNER JOIN TicketStatuses ON Tickets.StatusId = TicketStatuses.Id INNER JOIN TicketPriorities ON Tickets.PriorityId = TicketPriorities.Id WHERE Tickets.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY TicketStatuses.Name, TicketPriorities.Name

Scenarios.Question: outage count by region and severity
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Regions.NameEn, Outages.Severity, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Outages INNER JOIN Regions ON Outages.RegionId = Regions.Id GROUP BY Regions.NameEn, Outages.Severity

Scenarios.Question: bill totals per service type per month
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT ServiceTypes.NameEn, FORMAT(Bills.IssuedAt, 'yyyy-MM') AS Month, SUM(Bills.TotalAmount) AS Total FROM Bills INNER JOIN ServiceTypes ON Bills.ServiceTypeId = ServiceTypes.Id WHERE Bills.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY ServiceTypes.NameEn, FORMAT(Bills.IssuedAt, 'yyyy-MM')

Scenarios.Question: departments that have handled more than 10 tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Departments.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS TicketCount FROM Tickets INNER JOIN Departments ON Tickets.DepartmentId = Departments.Id WHERE Tickets.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY Departments.NameEn HAVING COUNT(*) > 10

Scenarios.Question: regions where total billed amount exceeds 100000
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Regions.NameEn, SUM(Bills.TotalAmount) AS Total FROM Bills INNER JOIN Customers ON Bills.CustomerId = Customers.Id INNER JOIN Regions ON Customers.RegionId = Regions.Id WHERE Bills.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY Regions.NameEn HAVING SUM(Bills.TotalAmount) > 100000

Scenarios.Question: service types with at least 5 outages
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT ServiceTypes.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS OutageCount FROM Outages INNER JOIN ServiceTypes ON Outages.ServiceTypeId = ServiceTypes.Id GROUP BY ServiceTypes.NameEn HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5

Scenarios.Question: top 5 customers by total billed amount
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 Customers.FullNameEn, SUM(Bills.TotalAmount) AS Total FROM Customers INNER JOIN Bills ON Bills.CustomerId = Customers.Id WHERE Bills.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY Customers.FullNameEn ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: 5 departments that resolved the fewest tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 Departments.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS Resolved FROM Tickets INNER JOIN Departments ON Tickets.DepartmentId = Departments.Id WHERE Tickets.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND Tickets.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY Departments.NameEn ORDER BY Resolved ASC

Scenarios.Question: longest-running unresolved tickets, top 10
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NULL AND IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY CreatedAt ASC

Scenarios.Question: ticket number, title, and created date for all open tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Tickets.TicketNumber, Tickets.Title, Tickets.CreatedAt FROM Tickets INNER JOIN TicketStatuses ON Tickets.StatusId = TicketStatuses.Id WHERE TicketStatuses.Name = 'Open' AND Tickets.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: bill numbers and totals for unpaid bills
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT BillNumber, TotalAmount FROM Bills WHERE Status <> 'Paid' AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: high-priority tickets created in the last 30 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Tickets.TicketNumber, Tickets.Title FROM Tickets INNER JOIN TicketPriorities ON Tickets.PriorityId = TicketPriorities.Id WHERE TicketPriorities.Name IN ('Critical','High') AND Tickets.CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day,-30,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND Tickets.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: customers in Aleppo whose status is Active
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Customers.FullNameEn, Customers.Phone FROM Customers INNER JOIN Regions ON Customers.RegionId = Regions.Id WHERE Regions.NameEn = 'Aleppo' AND Customers.Status = 'Active'

Scenarios.Question: bills issued between 2025-01-01 and 2025-06-30
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT BillNumber, IssuedAt, TotalAmount FROM Bills WHERE IssuedAt >= '2025-01-01' AND IssuedAt < '2025-07-01' AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets with the name of the customer who created them
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Tickets.TicketNumber, Tickets.Title, Customers.FullNameEn FROM Tickets INNER JOIN Customers ON Tickets.CustomerId = Customers.Id WHERE Tickets.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: outages joined with the responsible department name
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Outages.OutageNumber, Outages.StartedAt, Departments.NameEn FROM Outages INNER JOIN Departments ON Outages.DepartmentId = Departments.Id

Scenarios.Question: tickets with department name, priority, and status all together
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Tickets.TicketNumber, Departments.NameEn AS Department, TicketPriorities.Name AS Priority, TicketStatuses.Name AS Status FROM Tickets INNER JOIN Departments ON Tickets.DepartmentId = Departments.Id INNER JOIN TicketPriorities ON Tickets.PriorityId = TicketPriorities.Id INNER JOIN TicketStatuses ON Tickets.StatusId = TicketStatuses.Id WHERE Tickets.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: bills with the customer's full name and the bill's service type label
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Bills.BillNumber, Customers.FullNameEn, ServiceTypes.NameEn FROM Bills INNER JOIN Customers ON Bills.CustomerId = Customers.Id INNER JOIN ServiceTypes ON Bills.ServiceTypeId = ServiceTypes.Id WHERE Bills.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: customers who have never been billed
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Customers.FullNameEn FROM Customers LEFT JOIN Bills ON Bills.CustomerId = Customers.Id WHERE Bills.Id IS NULL

Scenarios.Question: service types that have no recorded outage
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT ServiceTypes.NameEn FROM ServiceTypes LEFT JOIN Outages ON Outages.ServiceTypeId = ServiceTypes.Id WHERE Outages.Id IS NULL

Scenarios.Question: departments without any assigned ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Departments.NameEn FROM Departments LEFT JOIN Tickets ON Tickets.DepartmentId = Departments.Id AND Tickets.IsDeleted = 0 WHERE Tickets.Id IS NULL

Scenarios.Question: distinct ticket statuses currently in use
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT TicketStatuses.Name FROM Tickets INNER JOIN TicketStatuses ON Tickets.StatusId = TicketStatuses.Id WHERE Tickets.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: unique region names where any outage occurred
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT Regions.NameEn FROM Outages INNER JOIN Regions ON Outages.RegionId = Regions.Id

Scenarios.Question: rows 21 to 40 of bills ordered by issue date descending
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT BillNumber, IssuedAt, TotalAmount FROM Bills WHERE IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY IssuedAt DESC OFFSET 20 ROWS FETCH NEXT 20 ROWS ONLY

Scenarios.Question: page 3 of customers sorted by name, 25 per page
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT FullNameEn, Email, Phone FROM Customers ORDER BY FullNameEn OFFSET 50 ROWS FETCH NEXT 25 ROWS ONLY

Scenarios.Question: customers sorted by full name then by registration date descending
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT FullNameEn, CreatedAt FROM Customers ORDER BY FullNameEn ASC, CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: outages ordered by severity then start time
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT OutageNumber, Severity, StartedAt FROM Outages ORDER BY Severity, StartedAt

Scenarios.Question: list every ticket opened during today's session
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: outages started yesterday
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT OutageNumber, StartedAt FROM Outages WHERE CAST(StartedAt AS DATE) = CAST(DATEADD(day,-1,GETDATE()) AS DATE)

Scenarios.Question: bills issued in the last 90 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT BillNumber, IssuedAt, TotalAmount FROM Bills WHERE IssuedAt >= DATEADD(day,-90,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets resolved this week
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, ResolvedAt FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt >= DATEADD(week, DATEDIFF(week, 0, GETDATE()), 0) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets opened this month compared to last month
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisMonth, SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(month,-1,GETDATE())), MONTH(DATEADD(month,-1,GETDATE())), 1) AND CreatedAt < DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastMonth FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: year over year change in total billed amount
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(IssuedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE()) THEN TotalAmount ELSE 0 END) AS ThisYear, SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(IssuedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE())-1 THEN TotalAmount ELSE 0 END) AS LastYear FROM Bills WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: outages today vs the same day last week
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(StartedAt AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Today, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(StartedAt AS DATE) = CAST(DATEADD(day,-7,GETDATE()) AS DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SameDayLastWeek FROM Outages

Scenarios.Question: using a cte show the daily ticket open count for the last 30 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH DailyOpens AS (SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS Opens FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day,-30,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE)) SELECT Day, Opens FROM DailyOpens ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: with a cte get the running monthly bill totals
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH Monthly AS (SELECT FORMAT(IssuedAt, 'yyyy-MM') AS Month, SUM(TotalAmount) AS Total FROM Bills WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(IssuedAt, 'yyyy-MM')) SELECT Month, Total, SUM(Total) OVER (ORDER BY Month) AS RunningTotal FROM Monthly ORDER BY Month

Scenarios.Question: with two ctes compute department ticket volume then filter to departments above the median
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH Volumes AS (SELECT Departments.NameEn AS Department, COUNT(*) AS V FROM Tickets INNER JOIN Departments ON Tickets.DepartmentId = Departments.Id WHERE Tickets.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY Departments.NameEn), MedianVal AS (SELECT DISTINCT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY V) OVER () AS M FROM Volumes) SELECT Department, V FROM Volumes CROSS JOIN MedianVal WHERE V > M ORDER BY V DESC

Scenarios.Question: assign each customer a billing-volume rank using a window function
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Customers.FullNameEn, SUM(Bills.TotalAmount) AS Total, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(Bills.TotalAmount) DESC) AS Rnk FROM Customers INNER JOIN Bills ON Bills.CustomerId = Customers.Id WHERE Bills.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY Customers.FullNameEn

Scenarios.Question: row number for tickets ordered by created date within each priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Tickets.TicketNumber, TicketPriorities.Name AS Priority, Tickets.CreatedAt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TicketPriorities.Name ORDER BY Tickets.CreatedAt) AS Rn FROM Tickets INNER JOIN TicketPriorities ON Tickets.PriorityId = TicketPriorities.Id WHERE Tickets.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: month over month change in ticket count using lag
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH M AS (SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') AS Month, COUNT(*) AS C FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM')) SELECT Month, C, C - LAG(C) OVER (ORDER BY Month) AS MoMChange FROM M ORDER BY Month

Scenarios.Question: median resolution time in hours per priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT TicketPriorities.Name AS Priority, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY DATEDIFF(hour, Tickets.CreatedAt, Tickets.ResolvedAt)) OVER (PARTITION BY TicketPriorities.Name) AS MedianHours FROM Tickets INNER JOIN TicketPriorities ON Tickets.PriorityId = TicketPriorities.Id WHERE Tickets.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND Tickets.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: 7 day rolling average of new tickets per day
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH D AS (SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS C FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE)) SELECT Day, C, AVG(C * 1.0) OVER (ORDER BY Day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS Rolling7 FROM D ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: customers missing an email address
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT FullNameEn FROM Customers WHERE Email IS NULL

Scenarios.Question: tickets never assigned to anyone
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE AssignedToUserId IS NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: bills that have not been paid yet
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT BillNumber, TotalAmount FROM Bills WHERE PaidAt IS NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets whose title mentions billing
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE Title LIKE '%billing%' AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: customers whose name starts with Ahmed
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT FullNameEn, Phone FROM Customers WHERE FullNameEn LIKE 'Ahmed%'

Scenarios.Question: how many cases were opened last month (case = ticket)
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(month,-1,GETDATE())), MONTH(DATEADD(month,-1,GETDATE())), 1) AND CreatedAt < DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: list all incidents currently unresolved (incident = ticket)
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: all critical-priority unresolved tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Tickets.TicketNumber, Tickets.Title FROM Tickets INNER JOIN TicketPriorities ON Tickets.PriorityId = TicketPriorities.Id WHERE TicketPriorities.Name = 'Critical' AND Tickets.ResolvedAt IS NULL AND Tickets.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: customers whose status is Churned
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT FullNameEn FROM Customers WHERE Status = 'Churned'

Scenarios.Question: كم عدد التذاكر المغلقة هذا الشهر
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets INNER JOIN TicketStatuses ON Tickets.StatusId = TicketStatuses.Id WHERE TicketStatuses.Name = 'Closed' AND Tickets.ClosedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1) AND Tickets.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: متوسط مدة حل التذاكر بالساعات
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(DATEDIFF(hour, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt)) AS AvgHours FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: العملاء في حلب الذين لديهم فواتير غير مدفوعة
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT Customers.FullNameEn FROM Customers INNER JOIN Regions ON Customers.RegionId = Regions.Id INNER JOIN Bills ON Bills.CustomerId = Customers.Id WHERE Regions.NameAr = N'حلب' AND Bills.PaidAt IS NULL AND Bills.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: show me tickets [TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt] and their assigned user
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Tickets.TicketNumber, Tickets.Title, Tickets.CreatedAt, AspNetUsers.UserName FROM Tickets LEFT JOIN AspNetUsers ON Tickets.AssignedToUserId = AspNetUsers.Id WHERE Tickets.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets - TicketNumber - Title - and their priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Tickets.TicketNumber, Tickets.Title, TicketPriorities.Name FROM Tickets INNER JOIN TicketPriorities ON Tickets.PriorityId = TicketPriorities.Id WHERE Tickets.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets | TicketNumber | Title | their status
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Tickets.TicketNumber, Tickets.Title, TicketStatuses.Name FROM Tickets INNER JOIN TicketStatuses ON Tickets.StatusId = TicketStatuses.Id WHERE Tickets.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: give me customers (FullNameEn, Email, Phone) plus their region
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Customers.FullNameEn, Customers.Email, Customers.Phone, Regions.NameEn FROM Customers INNER JOIN Regions ON Customers.RegionId = Regions.Id

Scenarios.Question: find the top 5 customers by total billed then list their unpaid bills
show the worst department by ticket count then list its open tickets
show full details of ticket TCK-2026-001
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT * FROM Tickets WHERE TicketNumber = 'TCK-2026-001'

Scenarios.Question: ticket age in days for every open ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title, DATEDIFF(day, CreatedAt, GETDATE()) AS AgeDays FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: percentage of bills paid versus unpaid
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN PaidAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS PercentPaid FROM Bills WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: top stuff
the best ones
give me a stock-market summary for SYP this morning
predict next month's electricity demand
your opinion on tariff policy
delete ticket TCK-2026-001
mark all open tickets as resolved
insert a new customer named Test
customers whose total billed exceeds the average customer billed amount
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH PerCust AS (SELECT CustomerId, SUM(TotalAmount) AS T FROM Bills WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CustomerId) SELECT Customers.FullNameEn, PerCust.T FROM PerCust INNER JOIN Customers ON Customers.Id = PerCust.CustomerId WHERE PerCust.T > (SELECT AVG(T) FROM PerCust) ORDER BY PerCust.T DESC

Scenarios.Question: departments that handled at least one critical ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT Departments.NameEn FROM Departments WHERE Departments.Id IN (SELECT DISTINCT Tickets.DepartmentId FROM Tickets INNER JOIN TicketPriorities ON Tickets.PriorityId = TicketPriorities.Id WHERE TicketPriorities.Name = 'Critical' AND Tickets.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: tickets that have a parent ticket along with the parent's ticket number
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Child.TicketNumber AS ChildNumber, Parent.TicketNumber AS ParentNumber FROM Tickets AS Child INNER JOIN Tickets AS Parent ON Child.ParentTicketId = Parent.Id WHERE Child.ParentTicketId IS NOT NULL AND Child.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: districts under the Damascus governorate
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Child.NameEn FROM Regions AS Child INNER JOIN Regions AS Parent ON Child.ParentRegionId = Parent.Id WHERE Parent.NameEn = 'Damascus'

Scenarios.Question: customers who have at least one open ticket and at least one unpaid bill
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT Customers.FullNameEn FROM Customers WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Tickets INNER JOIN TicketStatuses ON Tickets.StatusId = TicketStatuses.Id WHERE Tickets.CustomerId = Customers.Id AND TicketStatuses.Name = 'Open' AND Tickets.IsDeleted = 0) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Bills WHERE Bills.CustomerId = Customers.Id AND Bills.PaidAt IS NULL AND Bills.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: for each service type, count of bills and total amount billed
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT ServiceTypes.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS BillCount, SUM(Bills.TotalAmount) AS Total FROM Bills INNER JOIN ServiceTypes ON Bills.ServiceTypeId = ServiceTypes.Id WHERE Bills.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY ServiceTypes.NameEn

Scenarios.Question: earliest ticket creation date in the system
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MIN(CreatedAt) AS EarliestCreated FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: highest bill amount ever issued
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MAX(TotalAmount) AS MaxAmount FROM Bills WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: first response time vs resolution time for resolved tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, DATEDIFF(hour, CreatedAt, FirstRespondedAt) AS FirstResponseHours, DATEDIFF(hour, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS ResolutionHours FROM Tickets WHERE FirstRespondedAt IS NOT NULL AND ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: ticket counts bucketed by week for the last 8 weeks
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DATEADD(week, DATEDIFF(week, 0, CreatedAt), 0) AS WeekStart, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(week, -8, GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY DATEADD(week, DATEDIFF(week, 0, CreatedAt), 0) ORDER BY WeekStart

Scenarios.Question: tickets whose status is Open or InProgress
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Tickets.TicketNumber, Tickets.Title FROM Tickets INNER JOIN TicketStatuses ON Tickets.StatusId = TicketStatuses.Id WHERE TicketStatuses.Name IN ('Open','InProgress') AND Tickets.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: bills with amounts between 100 and 500
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT BillNumber, TotalAmount FROM Bills WHERE TotalAmount BETWEEN 100 AND 500 AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: for each region, the count of open tickets and the count of closed tickets in two columns
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Regions.NameEn, SUM(CASE WHEN TicketStatuses.Name = 'Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OpenCount, SUM(CASE WHEN TicketStatuses.Name = 'Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ClosedCount FROM Tickets INNER JOIN TicketStatuses ON Tickets.StatusId = TicketStatuses.Id INNER JOIN Regions ON Tickets.RegionId = Regions.Id WHERE Tickets.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY Regions.NameEn

Scenarios.Question: average csat score per ticket priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketPriorities.Name AS Priority, AVG(CAST(CsatResponses.Score AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgScore FROM CsatResponses INNER JOIN Tickets ON CsatResponses.TicketId = Tickets.Id INNER JOIN TicketPriorities ON Tickets.PriorityId = TicketPriorities.Id WHERE Tickets.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY TicketPriorities.Name

Scenarios.Question: average meter reading per service type
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT ServiceTypes.NameEn, AVG(MeterReadings.Value) AS AvgReading FROM MeterReadings INNER JOIN ServiceTypes ON MeterReadings.ServiceTypeId = ServiceTypes.Id GROUP BY ServiceTypes.NameEn

Scenarios.Question: current tariff rate for each service type
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT ServiceTypes.NameEn, Tariffs.RatePerUnit FROM Tariffs INNER JOIN ServiceTypes ON Tariffs.ServiceTypeId = ServiceTypes.Id WHERE Tariffs.EffectiveFrom <= GETDATE() AND (Tariffs.EffectiveTo IS NULL OR Tariffs.EffectiveTo > GETDATE())
